name: Company Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cooked, cut-up chicken; up-to 4 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix rice with melted butter or margarine in crockpot.
2. Stir to coat rice thoroughly.
3. Add all remaining ingredients, except slivered almonds and 2 tablespoons green onions.
4. Stir well.
5. Sprinkle reserved almonds and green onions over top.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours or High for 3 to 4 hours.
